issues.file: test: AC-001-1: Meta banner is visible without scrolling

observations: The meta banner at the top is present and visible above the fold, clearly labeling this as a RootSpec demo — the most important element is doing its job.
The hero section repeats twice in the viewport on desktop, which appears to be a layout or scroll-capture artifact rather than an intentional design choice and may confuse first-time visitors.
The 'How It Works' section skills grid becomes visually cluttered at mobile widths, with card text overlapping the section heading in the third screenshot.
Typography is clean and editorial in character — the serif/sans pairing reads well and avoids the generic AI-generated startup-page aesthetic the spec explicitly warns against.

The 'The Problem: Spec Drift' section repeats several times in the long-scroll screenshots, suggesting either a rendering loop or the section is being shown at multiple breakpoints stacked — a human should verify this is intentional.
